justification: cross-file bug fix with test updates is code editing beyond small isolated change, so use general-purpose agent and standard tier; gpt-5.3-codex is cheapest suitable available standard model.
fallback_strategy: if gpt-5.3-codex unavailable, stay in standard tier and use gemini-3.1-pro-preview or gpt-5.4; do not drop to fast tier for cross-file editing.
